<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$MDPS$ = DPS * Max Hits
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 375; 200; 700; 2500; 6350; 16935
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 2; 0;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Improved Handling; Higher Voltage; Faraday's Vest; Shock Force; Zeus Cannon
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 3280081327; 4675534331; 4675521746; 4675504505; 4675504640
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
$DREF$ = <ref>Assumes that only one enemy is hit per shock.</ref>
$MREF$ = <ref>Calculated as DPS × Max Hits.</ref>
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! Chain Range !! Max Hits !! Shock Time !! Defense Drop !! DPS$DREF$ !! Max DPS$MREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 0.75 || 11 || 7 || 1 || 0.05 || 5% || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 0.75 || 12.5 || 7 || 1 || 0.05 || 5% || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 6 || 0.65 || 12.5 || 7 || 1 || 0.08 || 10% || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 12 || 0.65 || 12.5 || 7 || 2 || 0.08 || 10% || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 115 || 2.25 || 16 || 10 || 2 || 0.18 || 15% || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 200 || 2.25 || 17 || 10 || 3 || 0.3 || 25% || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
